commands.cmd: read-only card/list/filter, planner/allocation, profile preference, authorization, query and concurrent Pantry ownership map

summary: Mapped existing factual card filters and authorized per-person planner flow, then split the missing persisted display flags and two N+1/history performance repairs into reviewable card and planner Workers.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Scout exceeded the single-wait limit and was interrupted; the PM completed the same read-only map as permitted fallback.
remaining_blockers: A Judge must approve the additive preference and recipe-library batch slice before implementation.
The planner preview/bounded projection slice requires a separate post-card review.
Household analysis/charts, offline/performance documentation and rendered final evidence remain later tasks.
